{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Kelsa's father
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Bloodline (novel)|Bloodline]]
}}

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Kelsa's father]] has burned eyes and uses a cane.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8">''Bloodline'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“Father’s eyes were burned,” she said, and the words struck Lindon strangely. He can see basic shapes and can tell the difference between light and dark, but he gets by mostly with his ears and his cane.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
